task_completion.description: The source Landsat TIFF file is opened in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer or main window shows 'landsat_multispectral.tif' loaded.

task_completion.description: The radiometric calibration formula is applied to the bands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Math dialog or similar interface shows the expression containing '* 0.0000275 - 0.2' being applied to the bands.

task_completion.description: The final product is configured to contain only the four calibrated bands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A subset dialog, band selection window, or the Product Explorer shows a product containing exactly four bands (the calibrated ones).

task_completion.description: The result is saved in BEAM-DIMAP format to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' dialog or file manager shows 'landsat_sr_calibrated.dim' being saved to or present in '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

task_completion.description: The result is exported as a GeoTIFF to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or file manager shows 'landsat_sr_calibrated.tif' being saved to or present in '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SNAP (Sentinel Application Platform) GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SNAP application window is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Band Math or similar tool to compute the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Band Math dialog or processing progress bar is visible, not just a terminal command or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SNAP export dialog or save dialog is visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif and has exactly 4 bands. The calibration formula requires a scale factor of 0.0000275 and an offset of -0.2. The expected output data type is float32. The final outputs must be saved to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_sr_calibrated.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_sr_calibrated.tif.
